mapper.select: select * from mw_user where username = #{username} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select * from mw_user where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update mw_user set last_time = #{lastTime}, last_ip = #{lastIp}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0
mapper.select:
select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0
and user_id in
#{id}
and 1 = 0
select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0 order by user_id asc
select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0 order by user_id desc
select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0 and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%') order by user_id desc

select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and role_id = #{roleId}
order by user_id desc

select * from mw_user where is_delete = 0
and user_id not in
#{id}
order by user_id asc
select count(*) from mw_user where username = #{username} and is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: insert into mw_user(username, password, given_name, mobile, phone, email, department, position, location, im, last_ip, last_time, role_id, is_forbidden, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{givenName}, #{mobile}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, #{position}, #{location}, #{im}, '', 0, #{roleId}, 0, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into mw_user(username, password, given_name, mobile, phone, email, department, position, location, im, last_ip, last_time, role_id, is_forbidden, is_delete, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{givenName}, #{mobile}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, #{position}, #{location}, #{im}, #{lastIp}, #{lastTime}, #{roleId}, 0, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update mw_user set given_name = #{givenName}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, phone = #{phone}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, location = #{location}, im = #{im}, last_time = #{lastTime}, last_ip = #{lastIp}, update_time = #{updateTime} where username = #{username} and is_delete = 0

update mw_user set given_name = #{givenName}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, phone = #{phone}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, location = #{location}, im = #{im}, role_id = #{roleId}, update_time = #{updateTime} where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0

update mw_user set given_name = #{givenName}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, phone = #{phone}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, location = #{location}, im = #{im}, role_id = #{roleId}, password = #{password}, update_time = #{updateTime} where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0

update mw_user set given_name = #{givenName}, email = #{email}, mobile = #{mobile}, phone = #{phone}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, location = #{location}, im = #{im}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0
update mw_user set password = #{password}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0
update mw_user set is_forbidden = #{isForbidden}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from mw_user where is_delete = 0 and role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.update: update mw_user set role_id = #{roleId}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from mw_user where is_delete = 0 and is_forbidden = 0
select count(*) from mw_user where is_delete = 0 and is_forbidden = 1
select count(*) from mw_user where is_delete = 0 and last_time >= #{startTime}
